originalTitle: The Onion’s rebooted InfoWars is coming July 2nd
summary: The Onion's InfoWars officially has a launch date: On July 2nd, the conspiracy network previously run by Alex Jones will return as a comedy and media platform. The reboot comes more than a year and a half after news broke that the satirical news site was working to acquire the property owned by Jones, a […]
content: The Onion’s InfoWars officially has a launch date: On July 2nd, the conspiracy network previously run by Alex Jones will return as a comedy and media platform. The reboot comes more than a year and a half after news broke that the satirical news site was working to acquire the property owned by Jones, a conspiracy theorist who notably targeted victims of the Sandy Hook school shooting. “Developed with the support of the Sandy Hook families, the new InfoWars is being reimagined as a comedy and cultural platform featuring original programming, guest talent, and new comedic voices,” a press release reads. “The project reflects The Onion’s broader vision to build a modern, internet-native comedy ecosystem rooted in curation, creativity, and direct audience engagement.” The company says the relaunch coincides with a $100,000 donation to the Sandy Hook families that was raised through merch sales related to the project, and it says it will be “the first of many.” “The donation represents the first funds the families will receive as a direct result of the sale process surrounding InfoWars,” the press release reads. After losing a defamation suit, Jones was ordered in 2022 to pay $1.5 billion to the families of the Sandy Hook shooting, which he for years has called a hoax. [Media: https://www.instagram.com/reel/DXe8ScnE-a1/] The new InfoWars is led by comedian Tim Heidecker, who Jones spent several episodes attempting to undermine as he was about to lose his show. The Onion has teased its version of InfoWars in several social media clips: One clip features a recurring Onion character, the fictional newscaster Jim Haggerty, returning as a conspiracy-brained podcaster. Haggerty previously hosted Today Now!, The Onion’s daily talkshow, and Porkin’ Across America, a food travel show in which — spoiler — Haggerty eventually turns into a pig. Under the current proposed deal for the takeover of InfoWars, The Onion would license the InfoWars brand from the court-appointed manager of the property. Heidecker told Wired that the site is “in limbo” but that The Onion is going ahead with the relaunch anyway.  “The story isn’t really about InfoWars anymore. It’s about what happens when you take a platform that was built around bullshit and fear and turn it into something that supports funny, human stuff instead,” Ben Collins, CEO of The Onion said in an email. “At a moment when so much of media is shrinking, we’re investing in comedians, creators, and original programming because we think people want something better, made by people.” InfoWars will premier at 8PM ET on the 2nd at theonion.info and on The Onion’s social media channels. Update June 18th: Added comment from Ben Collins.
chineseTitle: The Onion 重启的 InfoWars 将于 7 月 2 日推出
chineseSummary: The Onion 的 InfoWars 正式确定了发布日期：7 月 2 日，之前由 Alex Jones 运营的阴谋网络将作为喜剧和媒体平台回归。一年半多前，有消息称该讽刺新闻网站正在努力收购琼斯拥有的财产，而重新启动是在 […]
chineseContent: The Onion 的 InfoWars 正式确定了发布日期：7 月 2 日，之前由 Alex Jones 运营的阴谋网络将作为喜剧和媒体平台回归。一年半多前，有消息称该讽刺新闻网站正在努力收购琼斯拥有的财产，琼斯是一位阴谋论者，主要针对桑迪胡克学校枪击事件的受害者。 “在桑迪胡克家族的支持下开发，新的 InfoWars 正在被重新构想为一个喜剧和文化平台，以原创节目、客串人才和新的喜剧声音为特色，”一份新闻稿称。 “该项目反映了洋葱的更广泛愿景，即建立一个植根于策展、创造力和直接观众参与的现代互联网原生喜剧生态系统。”该公司表示，此次重新启动恰逢向桑迪胡克家族捐赠 10 万美元，这笔捐款是通过与该项目相关的商品销售筹集的，并表示这将是“众多捐赠中的第一笔”。新闻稿中写道：“这笔捐款是这些家庭将收到的第一笔资金，这是 InfoWars 销售过程的直接结果。”在诽谤诉讼败诉后，琼斯于 2022 年被勒令向桑迪胡克枪击事件的家属支付 15 亿美元，多年来他一直称这是一场骗局。 [媒体：https://www.instagram.com/reel/DXe8ScnE-a1/] 新的 InfoWars 由喜剧演员蒂姆·海德克 (Tim Heidecker) 领导，琼斯在几集中试图破坏他，因为他即将输掉自己的节目。 《洋葱报》在多个社交媒体剪辑中调侃了其版本的 InfoWars：其中一个剪辑以一个反复出现的《洋葱报》角色为主角，即虚构的新闻播音员吉姆·哈格蒂，他以阴谋论播客的身份回归。哈格蒂此前曾主持过《洋葱报》的每日脱口秀《Today Now!》和美食旅游杂志《Porkin’ Across America》
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
